Mo To Compel Answrs To Post-Judgment Disco
Off Calendar Aug-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s motion is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff to submit proposed order on or before August 21, 2009. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
